articles.description: BBC Sport's chief football writer Phil McNulty examines who - or what - is to blame for Spurs' crisis as they fight to avoid relegation.
articles.title: Spurs crisis - who is to blame for club's struggles?

articles.description: In completing the set of centuries across all formats despite T20 World Cup semi-final defeat by India, Jacob Bethell shows why he is integral to England's future, writes Matthew Henry.
articles.title: Jacob Bethell: England's standout player of a mixed winter offers hope for future across all formats

articles.description: Wales aim to have the last laugh against Ireland in the Six Nations at the Aviva Stadium on Friday after being the subject of ridicule.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Ireland v Wales - Visitors aim to show they are no joke in Dublin

articles.description: Aston Martin's dire start to the season has left Fernando Alonso in a "hard mental place", says team principal Adrian Newey.
articles.title: Fernando Alonso in 'hard mental place' because of Aston Martin's problems, says Adrian Newey

articles.description: West Ham manager Nuno Espirito Santo is calling for clarity on what constitutes a foul at set-pieces, warning current levels of grappling and blocking are "almost crazy".
articles.title: West Ham's Nuno Espirito Santo calls for clarity on what constitutes foul

articles.description: Players have criticised the decision for a tennis tournament to be held in the UAE in the midst of Iranian attacks - including one still stranded there.
articles.title: Middle East conflict: Tennis players criticise ATP decision to start tournament in United Arab Emirates

articles.description: Steve Borthwick has abandoned his philosophy of continuity and cohesion in the hope that selection shock therapy will cure his England side's malaise.
articles.title: Italy v England: Borthwick backs 'bibs backline' to ease Six Nations crisis

articles.description: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's FA Cup fifth-round ties.
articles.title: Premier League predictions: Chris Sutton v Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight - and AI

articles.description: LeBron James surpasses Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most field goals in NBA history as the Los Angeles Lakers lose at the Denver Nuggets.
articles.title: NBA: LeBron James surpasses Kareem Abdul-Jabbar to claim field-goal record

articles.description: Iran will not take part in the Milan-Cortina Winter Paralympics, the IPC confirms, as the nation's solitary athlete scheduled to compete "cannot travel safely to Italy".
articles.title: Winter Paralympics 2026: Iran's sole athlete will not take part in Milan-Cortina Games
